strengths: Demonstrated proper needle loading and initial suture placement technique
Successfully executed multiple knot throws with appropriate hand positioning
Maintained adequate instrument control throughout the suturing sequence
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task within the time limit, resulting in incomplete suturing
Did not demonstrate proper task completion verification before time expired
Inefficient workflow management leading to incomplete final steps

drills.name: Complete sequence timing drill
drills.description: Practice the entire suturing sequence from needle loading through final tail cutting within a 4-minute time limit, focusing on smooth transitions between phases.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the task within the time limit.

drills.name: Final verification protocol
drills.description: After completing each suture, practice a systematic check of knot security and proper tail cutting before considering the task complete.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not demonstrate proper task completion verification.

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the suturing task slowly with minimal wasted regrasping and deliberate instrument movements to improve efficiency.
drills.targets_weakness: Inefficient workflow management leading to incomplete final steps.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid technical skills into complete task execution within time constraints. Work on workflow efficiency and systematic completion protocols to ensure consistent task finishing.
